channel.title: Blog on NAEOS — Declarative Platform Engineering System
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on NAEOS — Declarative Platform Engineering System
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 NAEOS Foundation. All rights reserved.

item.title: NAEOS v2.1.0 Release
item.description:
We’re excited to announce the release of NAEOS v2.1.0! This release brings significant improvements to the platform.

What’s New

  • Enhanced NEIR model with expanded project structure support
  • Improved AI compiler with better instruction set generation
  • Performance optimizations across the pipeline
  • Enhanced error messages and debugging support

Changelog

For the full changelog, visit the GitHub Releases page.

item.title: Building Microservices with NAEOS — A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: In this tutorial, we’ll build a complete microservices application using NAEOS. You’ll learn how to define services, manage dependencies, generate code, and deploy.
